_meta.notes: No clinical review. No symptom/comorbidity requirements. Referral = auth. Schedule within 1 week.

criteria_source.notes: This payer has no published clinical criteria. Universal baseline provides contraindication checks for test TYPE selection (HST vs PSG) only. Does not gate authorization.

submission.notes: VA referral IS the authorization. No separate auth submission.

referral.notes: VA sends the referral -- we don't submit one. Must schedule within 1 week or referral cancelled.

flags.message: Must schedule within 1 week or VA cancels referral
